OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter E. Nissly, Esq., Law Offices of Steven A. Ellenberg, 408.998.8500, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Mark Russell, Gordon & Rees, 415.986.5900, appearing for Defendants Rocco and GoPayGo.

Matter A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS LEONARDO ROCCO, GOPAGO, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiffs have pled specific facts to support their punitive damages claim. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter E. Nissly, Esq., Law Offices of Steven A. Ellenberg, 408.998.8500, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Mark Russell, Gordon & Rees, 415.986.5900, appearing for Defendants Rocco and GoPaGo.

Matter A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS LEONARDO ROCCO, GOPAGO, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiffs have pled facts sufficient to state causes of action for breach of fiduciary duty and unfair competition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Continued To Sep-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
